subject: Formal time off request -- August 2027 window
body: Andrea per our conversation I am formally requesting time off covering Wednesday 28 July 2027 through Wednesday 4 August 2027 inclusive. Backs against my standing bid pattern. Marc and Priya lined up for the Saturdays. Happy to trade a December Saturday to balance. Yves

subject: Re: Summer 2027 -- decisions on the five
body: Lisa thanks for holding these clean. My gut is release Corridor Studios and Lansdowne to Bruce. Hold Cascade Library at Barbara's request for the 31 Jul date. Portland Preservation as long as Kelly can wait to April 15. Ambervale is standing so I keep that. Talk this week. Yves

subject: Papa Luc pre-trip A1C -- confirming June 8 09:30
body: Nurse Baker confirming Papa Luc pre-trip A1C review Tue 8 June 09:30. Please have travel paperwork ready for a mid-July pickup. We depart 30 July. Yves

subject: Re: Doc partage -- notes 80 ans -- confirmations Portland
body: Nathalie confirme cote Portland Papa moi et Sienna. Sienna cherche une couverture pour la fin de semaine du 1er. Emile prepare la partie memento avec moi. Yves
